steps.assistant_text: Standard -O0 USO accessor template (per feedback_uso_accessor_template_reuse.md). buf[2] alignment trick keeps stack slot at sp+0x18 matching target.

metadata.verification: Verified via byte_verify: build/.text bytes byte-identical to expected/.s. -O0 file split from bootup_uso.c into bootup_uso_o0_F1F0.c per feedback_uso_accessor_o0_file_split_recipe.
